type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment:
Atlas manufactures a variety of steel products with varying chemistries.
As a result, the slag produced in the melt furnaces will change in
composition from grade to grade.(Variability of slag composition)

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The reduction in manganese levels for 2001 is due to a significant  change in production levels.  Manganese is part of the steel chemistry for the raw material used in producing large diameter pipe. Pipe production for 2001 at Welland Pipe was dramaticall

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The facility was idled for 4 months (July - November 2022) to install new operating equipment. Site specific emission factors from CY2021 source testing were used to quantify onsite stack/point releases to air.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The facility was idled for 4 months (July - November 2022) to install new operating equipment. Site specific emission factors from CY2021 source testing were used to quantify stack point onsite releases to air. Engineering estimates were used to quantify fugitive emissions.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: Recorded ALL speciated VOCs but none of them met the 1 tonne  reporting threshold

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The facility was idled for 4 months (July - November 2022) to install new operating equipment. Annual consumption rates were used to quantify onsite VOC releases to air. It was assumed that all VOC's were 100% emitted. VOCs are not emitted through the stack at this facility. VOCs are fugitive in nature and not point source stack emissions.
